title: Flute of Crystalization
description: A mod that adds a flute that replaces blocks with amethyst. also based off of a dream I had.
body:
# WARNING
This is my first mod and is not meant to be used in large modpacks. There might be some mod incompatiblities that I dont know about.

## About Mod
"Flute of Crystalization" is a mod that adds just one item, that being the Crystal Flute. Using the crystal flute turns any block you look at into amethyst! (Yes, Even Bedrock!) it uh... also plays... fnf music for some reason?

This mod was originally a dream I had, however I decided to make it real.

### Songs Used in Mod
- Triple Trouble - MarStarBro, Uptaunt, Punkett
- You Can't Run - MarStarBro
- Endless - MarStarBro
- Powerdown - Kenny L, TaeSkull
- Full Body Amputation - Entro
